name: beaver-rss-digest
description: Configurable RSS digest with YAML + CLI

scripts.digest:run: ENV_FILE="$HOME/.beaver-skill/.env"; if command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1; then [ -f "$ENV_FILE" ] && ENVARG="--env-file=$ENV_FILE" || ENVARG=""; bun $ENVARG scripts/cli.ts run; else [ -f "$ENV_FILE" ] && ENVARG="--env-file=$ENV_FILE" || ENVARG=""; node $ENVARG --import tsx scripts/cli.ts run; fi
scripts.digest:init: ENV_FILE="$HOME/.beaver-skill/.env"; if command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1; then [ -f "$ENV_FILE" ] && ENVARG="--env-file=$ENV_FILE" || ENVARG=""; bun $ENVARG scripts/cli.ts init; else [ -f "$ENV_FILE" ] && ENVARG="--env-file=$ENV_FILE" || ENVARG=""; node $ENVARG --import tsx scripts/cli.ts init; fi
scripts.digest:config:path: ENV_FILE="$HOME/.beaver-skill/.env"; if command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1; then [ -f "$ENV_FILE" ] && ENVARG="--env-file=$ENV_FILE" || ENVARG=""; bun $ENVARG scripts/cli.ts config path; else [ -f "$ENV_FILE" ] && ENVARG="--env-file=$ENV_FILE" || ENVARG=""; node $ENVARG --import tsx scripts/cli.ts config path; fi
scripts.digest:config:validate: ENV_FILE="$HOME/.beaver-skill/.env"; if command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1; then [ -f "$ENV_FILE" ] && ENVARG="--env-file=$ENV_FILE" || ENVARG=""; bun $ENVARG scripts/cli.ts config validate; else [ -f "$ENV_FILE" ] && ENVARG="--env-file=$ENV_FILE" || ENVARG=""; node $ENVARG --import tsx scripts/cli.ts config validate; fi
scripts.digest:source:list: ENV_FILE="$HOME/.beaver-skill/.env"; if command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1; then [ -f "$ENV_FILE" ] && ENVARG="--env-file=$ENV_FILE" || ENVARG=""; bun $ENVARG scripts/cli.ts source list; else [ -f "$ENV_FILE" ] && ENVARG="--env-file=$ENV_FILE" || ENVARG=""; node $ENVARG --import tsx scripts/cli.ts source list; fi
scripts.digest:source:add: ENV_FILE="$HOME/.beaver-skill/.env"; if command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1; then [ -f "$ENV_FILE" ] && ENVARG="--env-file=$ENV_FILE" || ENVARG=""; bun $ENVARG scripts/cli.ts source add; else [ -f "$ENV_FILE" ] && ENVARG="--env-file=$ENV_FILE" || ENVARG=""; node $ENVARG --import tsx scripts/cli.ts source add; fi
scripts.digest:source:remove: ENV_FILE="$HOME/.beaver-skill/.env"; if command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1; then [ -f "$ENV_FILE" ] && ENVARG="--env-file=$ENV_FILE" || ENVARG=""; bun $ENVARG scripts/cli.ts source remove; else [ -f "$ENV_FILE" ] && ENVARG="--env-file=$ENV_FILE" || ENVARG=""; node $ENVARG --import tsx scripts/cli.ts source remove; fi
